1275 |     def _verification_read_gate_observation(
1276 |         self,
1277 |         tool_call: ToolCall,
1278 |         repo_path: str,
1279 |     ) -> Observation | None:
1280 |         """Gate post-synthesis source reads to semantic recommended verification reads."""
1281 |         state = getattr(self, "_analysis_phase_state", None)
1282 |         ledger = getattr(self, "_evidence_ledger", None)
1283 |         if state is None or not state.enabled or ledger is None:
1284 |             return None
1285 |         if state.phase not in {"synthesize", "verify", "answer"}:
1286 |             return None
1287 |         if tool_call.name not in _READ_TOOL_NAMES:
1288 |             return None
1289 |         file_path = tool_call.params.get("path") or tool_call.params.get("file_path") or ""
1290 |         if not file_path:
1291 |             return None
1292 |         from agent.policy import normalize_repo_path
1293 |         normalized = normalize_repo_path(file_path, repo_path)
1294 |         allowed = ledger.recommended_reads_for_phase("inspect")
1295 |         if normalized in allowed:
1296 |             return None
1297 |         allowed_text = ", ".join(sorted(allowed)) if allowed else "(none)"
1298 |         return Observation(
1299 |             status=ObservationStatus.SUCCESS,
1300 |             tool_name=tool_call.name,
1301 |             output=(
1302 |                 "Deferred source read by phased analysis controller: "
1303 |                 f"{normalized} is not in the recommended verification reads for the completed inspect phase. "
1304 |                 f"Recommended reads: {allowed_text}. Use the phase summary and artifact_read for raw evidence, "
1305 |                 "or answer with current confidence boundaries instead of broadening file reads."
1306 |             ),
1307 |         )

1309 |     def _duplicate_file_read_observation(
1310 |         self,
1311 |         tool_call: ToolCall,
1312 |         repo_path: str,
1313 |     ) -> Observation | None:
1314 |         """Return a synthetic observation when an identical file read was already done."""
1315 |         key = self._file_read_range_key(tool_call, repo_path)
1316 |         if key is None:
1317 |             return None
1318 |         if key not in self._read_file_ranges:
1319 |             self._read_file_ranges.add(key)
1320 |             return None
1321 |         path, start_line, end_line = key
1322 |         if end_line is None:
1323 |             range_text = "the full file"
1324 |         else:
1325 |             range_text = f"lines {start_line}-{end_line}"
1326 |         return Observation(
1327 |             status=ObservationStatus.SUCCESS,
1328 |             tool_name=tool_call.name,
1329 |             output=(
1330 |                 f"Skipped duplicate {tool_call.name}: {path} {range_text} was already read in this run. "
1331 |                 "Use the earlier observation instead of reading it again."
1332 |             ),
1333 |         )

1335 |     def _format_action_for_history(self, action: Action) -> str:
1336 |         """把 Action 格式化为 assistant 消息，写入对话历史。支持并行 tool_calls。"""
1337 |         parts = [f"Thought: {action.thought}"]
1338 |         if action.tool_calls:
1339 |             for tc in action.tool_calls:
1340 |                 parts.append(f"Action: {tc.name}")
1341 |                 parts.append(f"Params: {json.dumps(tc.params, ensure_ascii=False)}")
1342 |         elif action.message:
1343 |             parts.append(f"Message: {action.message}")
1344 |         return "\n".join(parts)
1345 | 
1346 |     def _format_observation_for_history(self, observation: Observation) -> str:
1347 |         """把单条 Observation 格式化为 user 消息（text fallback mode）。"""
1348 |         status = "SUCCESS" if observation.is_success() else "ERROR"
1349 |         lines = [f"[Tool: {observation.tool_name} | {status}]"]
1350 |         if observation.output:
1351 |             lines.append(observation.output)
1352 |         if observation.error and not observation.is_success():
1353 |             lines.append(f"Error: {observation.error}")
1354 |         return "\n".join(lines)

1359 |         "find_files", "find_symbol",
1360 |         "git_status", "git_add", "git_commit",
1361 |         "memory_read", "memory_list", "memory_search",
1362 |     })
